# API Checklist: Provide Property Value Estimate API Endpoint

**Purpose**: Validate estimate API request/response contracts and error codes.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/023-property-estimate-api/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Request Contract

- [x] CHK-API-001 Request accepts address, coordinates, polygon, or property ID.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Request accepts optional tuning parameters and output flags.

## Response Contract

- [x] CHK-API-003 Response includes baseline value, final estimate, adjustments, confidence, and warnings.
- [x] CHK-API-004 Response includes correlation ID in all cases.

## Error Codes

- [x] CHK-API-005 Validation errors use HTTP 400 vs 422 per spec.
- [x] CHK-API-006 Baseline missing uses HTTP 424 and timeout uses HTTP 503.
